title: Beehiiv vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Loops?
faq.a: Beehiiv starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
